subject: [RFC PATCH 01/40] mm: page_alloc: replace pageblock_flags bitmap with struct pageblock_data

2026-05-20.patch_summary: This patch replaces the packed bitmap of pageblock flags with a per-pageblock struct containing its own flags word, reducing cache line touches in the free path and simplifying accessor code. The memory overhead is 8 bytes per pageblock, but this is considered negligible. No functional changes are made.
